SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.party.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenPartyMomentumAnalysis

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.party.impl.ViewRiksdagenPartyMomentumAnalysis
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewRiksdagenPartyMomentumAnalysis") public class ViewRiksdagenPartyMomentumAnalysis extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
JPA entity for view_riksdagen_party_momentum_analysis database view. Intelligence Purpose: Analyzes party performance momentum and acceleration patterns with quarterly aggregation, volatility tracking, and stability classifications. Enables detection of rising/declining party trajectories and political instability. Created by: Liquibase v1.29 (Intelligence Operations) Risk Rules Supported: Pa-01, Pa-02, Pa-07 (Party momentum and stability assessment)
See Also:
